57_1_1.NKJV: Paul, a prisoner of Christ Jesus, and Timothy our brother, To Philemon our beloved friend and fellow laborer,

57_1_7.NKJV: For we have great joy and consolation in your love, because the hearts of the saints have been refreshed by you, brother.

57_1_14.NKJV: But without your consent I wanted to do nothing, that your good deed might not be by compulsion, as it were, but voluntary.
